name: server.R
ui.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Reactive gt Table"),
  div(downloadButton('downloadData', 'Download all data as XLSX'), style="float:right"),
  tabsetPanel(id = "tabs",
    tabPanel("GEEGLM",
      sidebarLayout(
        sidebarPanel(
          selectInput(
            "condition",
            "Condition(s)",
            choices =  c("Externalising", "Emotional", "Self-harm", "Substance problems", "Other", "All", "Any (but externalising)"),
            multiple = TRUE,
            selected = c("All"),
            selectize = TRUE
          ),
          selectInput(
           "model_exposure",
           "Exposure(s)",
            choices =  c("Supermarket", "Fruit and Vegetables", "Physical Activity", "Greenspace", "Bluespace", "Fast Food", "Takeaway", "Convenience Store", 
                         "Goods", "Bads", "Goods and Bads (3 groups)", "Goods and Bads (5 groups)", "HLI (3 groups)", "HLI"),
            multiple = TRUE,
            selected = c("Supermarket"),
            selectize = TRUE
          ),
          checkboxGroupInput(
            "model_type",
            "Model(s)",
            choices = c("adjusted", "unadjusted"),
            selected = c("adjusted", "unadjusted"),
            inline = FALSE
          ),
          checkboxInput("show_covars", "Print covariates?", TRUE),
          checkboxInput("show_summary", "Show statistical summary?", TRUE),
          checkboxInput("show_pval", "Show p-value", TRUE),
          width = 3
        ),
        mainPanel(
          gt_output("tbl")
        )
      ),
    ),
    tabPanel("Quantile g-computation",
             sidebarLayout(
               sidebarPanel(
                 selectInput(
                   "condition2",
                   "Condition(s)",
                   choices =  c("Externalising", "Emotional", "Self-harm", "Substance problems", "Other", "All", "Any (but externalising)"),
                   multiple = TRUE,
                   selected = c("All"),
                   selectize = TRUE
                 ),
                 checkboxGroupInput(
                   "model_type2",
                   "Model(s)",
                   choices = c("adjusted", "unadjusted"),
                   selected = c("adjusted", "unadjusted"),
                   inline = FALSE
                 ),
                 checkboxInput("show_covars2", "Print covariates?", TRUE),
                 checkboxInput("show_summary2", "Show statistical summary?", TRUE),
                 checkboxInput("show_pval2", "Show p-value", TRUE),
                 width = 3
               ),
               mainPanel(
                 gt_output("tbl2"),
               )
             )
      
    )
  )
)
